programme.desc: Jason from Essex picks three blind dates from five potential partners, based entirely on the three course menus they have created. Having dined with the three women, he decides who he wants to see again(n)

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: Three suitors buy an outfit for a singleton, who then goes on a date with the person whose taste in clothes they liked best. The first trio try to impress Essex girl Charlotte(n)

programme.title: Take Me Out
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness offers one last group of men the chance to enter the 'love lift' and win the hearts of his 30 single ladies. Tonight's would-be Romeos are Jono, a musical theatre performer from Mansfield, City trader Andrew from London, Blackpool car salesman Ian, and Jon, an account executive from Milton Keynes. Plus, Paddy catches up with last week's couples on the Isle of Fernandos(n)

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates viewers' videos featuring celebrity lookalikes. Holly Willoughby's husband risks everything to catch a glimpse of her in the nude, while Gregg Wallace tries to outsmart his ex-wife to retrieve his CD collection. Plus, what the Duke and Duchess of Cambridge get up to when the Queen isn't looking(n)

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revival of the supermarket-based game show in which three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles to win a £3,000 prize(n)

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Stewie's favourite teddy bear is ruined by a dog, and he grows attached to Lois after she tries to repair it. Meanwhile, Peter visits the doctor for a flu vaccination, but goes into a state of shock when given a prostate examination(n)

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter is devastated when his parents get a divorce, but begins to warm to his mother's newsreader boyfriend and reverts to being a child. Meanwhile, Brian is offered his own radio show. Animated comedy, featuring the voices of Seth MacFarlane and Mila Kunis(n)

programme.title: Zomboat!
programme.desc: The gang arrive at the hotel where Sunny and Amar spent their stag weekend, and Amar insists they check if their mates are alive, while Kat makes Jo stay and guard Dorothy(n)

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Meg becomes Mayor West's intern and promptly falls in love with him - but Brian resolves to prove he is corrupt. Meanwhile, a local talent show inspires Peter and Lois to turn to drugs in a misguided attempt to relive their days as folk singers(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan and Jack tease Blakey about the obvious attention he is receiving from the canteen girl(n)

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: A patient who set fire to his own shop (guest star Tony Slattery) attempts to avoid police questioning by leaping into an ambulance and driving off towards the pier - unaware Alun and a sick man are in the back of the vehicle. Meanwhile, Dr Makori fears for her relationship with Dr Fox when he tells her he has been offered a job in Biafra. Medical drama, with Andy Wear, Paul Fox and Kananu Kirimi(n)

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: A wedding reception held on Elsinby Pier ends in tragedy when a fishing trawler sails badly off course. Meanwhile, Adam faces up to a tough decision and the staff at the hospital prepare for a new arrival as Jill goes into labour. Robert Cavanah and Amy Robbins star(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Oscar finds himself in an awkward position when the police investigate a warehouse robbery. A lost property clear-out at the police station gives David a new hobby, but he soon manages to cause trouble. Starring Derek Fowlds and David Lonsdale(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Merton investigates a suspicious death with the help of CID and Walker begins to suspect a poacher may be involved. Vernon tempts fate by employing a new mechanic for the garage without asking Bernie and attempts to recreate a traditional dance at the town fete. Guest starring Hannah Gordon(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A pupil at the prestigious Devington School dies of a stab wound while competing in a race in honour of his recently deceased grandfather. DCI Barnaby discovers the death could be linked to a long-running rivalry between the school and the locals - or to the youngster's membership of an elite club dedicated to dining on suet puddings. Mystery, starring John Nettles, Daniel Casey and Jane Wymark(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A prominent resident is robbed and battered to death with her walking stick, and suspicion soon falls on the members of her reading club - which turns out to be a front for a lucrative investment portfolio. John Nettles and Daniel Casey star, with guest appearances by Anton Rodgers (Fresh Fields) and Angela Thorne (To the Manor Born)(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: An opera singer is shot by a sniper at an Oxford University ceremony just as she is about to receive an honorary degree. Morse is a big fan of her work and thinks she could not possibly be involved in anything untoward, but his investigations turn up more than a few sordid secrets. Detective drama, starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately, Robert Hardy, Sheila Gish, John Gielgud and Rachel Weisz(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: As the sole witness to a dying man's last words, Bobby Attfield is determined to solve the riddle they present, and forms an unlikely alliance with socialite Frankie Derwent and visiting family friend Miss Marple to help him on his quest. A trail of clues leads them to Castle Savage, where they uncover a hotbed of stifled emotion, treachery and deceit among its strange inhabitants. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, with a supporting cast that includes Sean Biggerstaff, Samantha Bond, Richard Briers, Rafe Spall, Warren Clarke, Mark Williams, Georgia Moffett, Helen Lederer and Rik Mayall(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuth is called to Gossington Hall by her old friend Dolly Bantry (Joanna Lumley) when she finds the corpse of an unknown blonde in the library of her home. It soon transpires that there is no shortage of suspects, including local bad boy Basil Blake (Ben Miller) and Dolly's husband Arthur (James Fox), but when the victim is identified as a dancer in line to inherit a fortune, enquiries take a different turn. Crime drama, starring Geraldine McEwan, with Simon Callow, Jack Davenport and Tara Fitzgerald(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The local gossips go to town when a naked and mutilated corpse is discovered in the middle of a crop circle. However, their lurid tales of extraterrestrial abduction soon take a turn for the macabre when more similarly injured cadavers are discovered, causing DCI Barnaby to question his down-to-earth approach. Murder mystery, starring John Nettles(n)

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon makes plans to take Tracey and Dorien on a madcap 1970s-themed weekender, but Tracey is about to receive some eye-opening news that could spoil her fun. First of a two-part episode of the comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph(n)

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: As Tracey awaits the results of her scan, she and Sharon swap home truths in the comfort of a spa, and try to make plans for the future, while Dorien prepares to say a long goodbye to her daughter Naomi. Second of a two-part episode of the comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph, with Frances Ruffelle and Michael Lumsden(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: A vulnerable young man is reported missing by his pub landlord boss. Syndicate 9 suspect Robin McKendrick may have been killed after a photo of him bound and gagged in a car boot appears online. However, the case takes an unusual turn when a body found in a flooded quarry turns out to be a woman's corpse. Meanwhile, battle-scarred from their conflict last year, Scott and Bailey are determined to move forward with honesty. The pair find themselves in front of the promotion board and pass with flying colours, leaving Gill with the task of choosing who stays on as sergeant at the department. Danny Webb joins a cast led by Lesley Sharp and Suranne Jones(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Syndicate 9 find themselves dealing with a high-profile historical case after Mandy Sweeting's body is recovered from a quarry, 23 years after she was first reported missing. However, Rachel's biggest challenge might not be dealing with the media attention or even re-interviewing bereft family members, but hiding her contempt for Rob Waddington's father Frankie (former Coronation Street star Ian Mercer), who led the original investigation. Meanwhile, Janet also has problems to deal with at home, as Elise moves in with her dad and his new girlfriend. But at least it inspires the detective to look at her own love life, as she confides in Rachel that she's started using dating sites. Crime drama, starring Suranne Jones, Lesley Sharp and Danny Miller(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: An opera singer is shot by a sniper at an Oxford University ceremony just as she is about to receive an honorary degree. Morse is a big fan of her work and thinks she could not possibly be involved in anything untoward, but his investigations turn up more than a few sordid secrets. Detective drama, starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately, Robert Hardy, Sheila Gish, John Gielgud and Rachel Weisz(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The severed arm of a missing environmental health inspector is washed up on the shores of the Humber and Frost's investigation leads him to a local meat factory. Unfortunately, his new lodger's annoying dog keeps distracting him from the case. Starring David Jason, Bruce Alexander, Emma Kay, Niall O'Brien and Tom Georgeson(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Olive becomes convinced Arthur is having an affair with a conductress at the depot. Comedy, with Reg Varney, Anna Karen and Michael Robbins(n)

programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin receives a date for his court case. Andy receives a shock when he goes to meet Amy at the airport. Vera announces she's spending her winnings on Joss's funeral(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liz is delighted to hear Amy isn't coming back. Steve looks after Andy when he gets drunk. Curly is surprised when Elaine agrees to have dinner with him(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: A rejection forces Turner to reconsider. Pollard considers an opportunity. Zoe comes out with some news and there's an unwelcome face in The Woolpack(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Turner's attempt to save face is ill-advised, while Jack's advice gives Leonard food for thought. Elizabeth and Pollard have an unpleasant encounter(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: PC Steve Crane takes an urgent phone call, and is shocked to discover Peter Pyke's warehouse has gone up in smoke. It soon emerges that the owner's wife had spent time behind bars for fraud, and her husband is reluctant to answer questions - leading Merton to suspect the blaze was deliberate. Meanwhile, Vernon moves into his new mansion, but has trouble keeping up with his well-to-do neighbours. Rural drama, starring James Carlton, Duncan Bell and Geoffrey Hughes(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan injures his foot in the bath and worries he will no longer be able to drive. However, conductor Jack is ready to offer plenty of good advice. Comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan's spirits are lifted by the arrival of a beautiful new waitress. Comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Robin and Jo become concerned when Chrissy starts dating an older man - so they decide to play gooseberry. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth sets out to solve the baffling murder of a Cambridge don who met with foul play shortly after deciding to change his will. Starring David Suchet, Beth Goddard and Mark Kingston(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An FBI agent crosses swords with Poirot while trying to retrieve the American Navy's top-secret plans for a new submarine, which have been stolen by a glamorous nightclub singer with a sideline in espionage. Drama, starring David Suchet(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Liz Merrick faces a trying time when one of her patients misses an appointment to discuss medication, and subsequently ends up charged with drink-driving, while Vernon's pal David is kidnapped and held to ransom. Merton is delighted Jenny has agreed to marry him, and Bellamy finds out that Gina is carrying his baby. Rural drama, starring Aislin McGuckin, Geoffrey Hughes and Duncan Bell(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Lynn lays down the law to Turner, while Pollard takes a risk. Zoe plucks up her courage, and Leonard bravely makes a decision(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: It is the day of the Hotten show. Frank is plagued by memories. Jack and Sarah are struck with guilt. Nick and Seth decide to share their high spirits(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Andy hides away in his flat, and Jim and Liz show a united front to console him. Curly tells Reg he does not want Elaine to go. Raquel is thrilled to receive a job offer(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Andy gets fed up with all the workers gossiping about Amy. Reg realises Curly has gone above him to Head Office. Derek and Mavis decide to entry the poetry contest(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The apparent suicide of a childless farmer's wife puts Barnaby on the scent of an ancient land feud over Setwale Wood. Potions, witchcraft, marital infidelity and a ruthless campaign to save the area form the heady brew that convinces the detective he is dealing with a case of murder. Wendy Craig guest stars, with John Nettles and Daniel Casey(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Liz Merrick faces a trying time when one of her patients misses an appointment to discuss medication, and subsequently ends up charged with drink-driving, while Vernon's pal David is kidnapped and held to ransom. programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is called in to investigate when the UK's prime minister and his secretary are kidnapped in France. However, he has only a day and a half to solve the case before an important conference is set to take place. Drama, starring David Suchet(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The rural bliss of Ferne Basset is rudely shattered by the discovery of an elderly resident's body in the river. When Barnaby and Troy descend on the village to ferret out the culprit, they get caught up in simmering backstage rivalries at a local amateur dramatics group that Joyce has recently joined - and the situation grows more sinister when one of the actors is tricked into killing himself in the middle of a performance(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey

Crime drama, starring Suranne Jones, Lesley Sharp and Danny Miller(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Rachel promised the chaos of her personal life was all in the past, but she is conflicted upon discovering her mother's new boyfriend is a violent domestic abuser. Meanwhile, Janet gets cold feet when she goes on her first date, terrified at the idea of having to impress a stranger. The crimebusters are united in the search for the killer of Rich Hutchings, who is found murdered in the flat he shares with his husband Adam. Barry, their outspoken and violent homophobic neighbour, is the prime suspect. However, as Adam's friend Tim struggles to recall the events of their night out, it seems Barry may be in the clear. Meanwhile, Rachel is horrified when her mum Sharon turns up asking for help. Crime drama, starring Suranne Jones, Lesley Sharp and Danny Miller(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Grizzled copper Jack Frost teams up with an obnoxious, chain-smoking colleague to investigate a seemingly straightforward hit-and-run incident that proves to have devastating repercussions for the victim's family and their peaceful rural community. David Jason, Bruce Alexander and Philip Jackson star(n)

programme.desc: Jack and Stan volunteer Olive as supervisor for the depot nursery. However, when she breaks her glasses and has to go home for a spare pair the clueless duo are left holding the fort. Comedy, starring Reg Varney, Bob Grant and Anna Karen(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan believes living at home is cramping his style and resolves to find his own place. Vintage comedy with Reg Varney and Bob Grant(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Chrissy and Jo invite a German guest to their dinner party - but Mr Roper demonstrates that the Second World War has not ended as far as he is concerned(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Captain Hastings and the Belgian supersleuth investigate a baffling gangland murder which draws them both into the underworld of London's Little Italy. Miss Lemon turns out to have a link with the victim's valet. Whodunit, starring David Suchet and Hugh Fraser(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is called in to investigate when the UK's prime minister and his secretary are kidnapped in France. However, he has only a day and a half to solve the case before an important conference is set to take place. Drama, starring David Suchet(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: An old friend of Merton is sent from CID to help track down a bank robber, and he agrees to be best man at the wedding, while Jenny's disgraced brother Steve tries to patch things up with his sister before she ties the knot. Events conspire to jeopardise the special day and stop the happy couple making it to the church on time. Duncan Bell, Sarah Tansey, Mark Jordon and Tricia Penrose star(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Michael persuades Sangeeta to let her hair down, while all hell breaks loose when Amos tells Annie the truth(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Steve is lurking with intent in Hotten. Turner's charitable intentions are far from honourable. Jack and Joe find they have a long way to go(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Andy tells Curly he wants to leave his job and move away. Denise receives a surprise delivery. Des is furious when Tanya tells him she set Raquel up(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Reg and Maureen decide to get married as soon as possible. Jim refuses to let Andy throw his life away. Elaine accuses Curly of ruining her career.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The bodies of a glamorous senior citizen and a distinguished doctor are found beside a river - and although suspicion for their murders initially falls on poachers, Barnaby suspects a more monetary motive for the attack. However, the case becomes complicated with the discovery that a local restaurateur, who had recently learnt his wife had been having an affair with the male victim, has also met an untimely end. With Honor Blackman, Philip Franks, James Hazeldine and Jeff Rawle(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: An old friend of Merton is sent from CID to help track down a bank robber, and he agrees to be best man at the wedding, while Jenny's disgraced brother Steve tries to patch things up with his sister before she ties the knot. Events conspire to jeopardise the special day and stop the happy couple making it to the church on time. Duncan Bell, Sarah Tansey, Mark Jordon and Tricia Penrose star(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A Belgian film star arrives in London and summons her friend Poirot to unravel the mysterious threats she has been receiving, which demand the return of a priceless diamond, the Western Star. Rosalind Bennett guest stars(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a woman is drowned in a bath and made to look like a bride, with a chilling lipstick message on the bathroom mirror, it triggers a spate of ghoulish wedding-themed murders in Great Worthy. The case takes Barnaby and Jones to a donkey sanctuary, a heritage steam railway and a pub run by an ex-policeman and former brothel madam as they try to identify the killer. Guest starring Pam Ferris (Rosemary & Thyme) and Kacey Ainsworth (formerly EastEnders' Little Mo)(n)

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part one of two. When the body of eminent lawyer Anaan Kamel is found washed up by an underground river, suspicion falls on Marcus Layton, a former employee of the victim's chambers who was recently fired by her husband Raheel. Text messages suggest an affair that had progressed to blackmail, but Banks and Morton struggle to find further information about Marcus, as his records only seem to date back five years. And when his corpse is found upstream in what looks to be a contract killing, the case becomes much more complicated(n)

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part two of two. With Geoff now a marked man, he and daughter Evie are put under watch at a hotel while the search for Mullen is widened. However, when the suspect follows Evie's boyfriend to the location and sets off the fire alarm, he draws Geoff and Evie outside. Meanwhile, Banks believes loan shark Hargreaves is behind the hit on Marcus, and manages to extend his stay in the cell, despite having very little evidence against him. The conclusion of the two-part case, starring Stephen Tompkinson(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Syndicate 9 find themselves dealing with a high-profile historical case after Mandy Sweeting's body is recovered from a quarry, 23 years after she was first reported missing. However, Rachel's biggest challenge might not be dealing with the media attention or even re-interviewing bereft family members, but hiding her contempt for Rob Waddington's father Frankie (former Coronation Street star Ian Mercer), who led the original investigation. Meanwhile, Janet also has problems to deal with at home, as Elise moves in with her dad and his new girlfriend. But at least it inspires the detective to look at her own love life, as she confides in Rachel that she's started using dating sites. Crime drama, starring Suranne Jones, Lesley Sharp and Danny Miller(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Rachel promised the chaos of her personal life was all in the past, but she is conflicted upon discovering her mother's new boyfriend is a violent domestic abuser. Meanwhile, Janet gets cold feet when she goes on her first date, terrified at the idea of having to impress a stranger. The crimebusters are united in the search for the killer of Rich Hutchings, who is found murdered in the flat he shares with his husband Adam. Barry, their outspoken and violent homophobic neighbour, is the prime suspect. However, as Adam's friend Tim struggles to recall the events of their night out, it seems Barry may be in the clear. Meanwhile, Rachel is horrified when her mum Sharon turns up asking for help. Crime drama, starring Suranne Jones, Lesley Sharp and Danny Miller(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales return to the Oxford Canal, the waterway where they first fell in love with boating more than 40 years ago. Aboard their own boat, they travel north from Banbury, heading for the old canal port of Braunston, joined by their daughter Juliet and sons Sam and Joe. As they navigate their way through the beautiful Cherwell Valley, Tim and Pru look back at some their favourite voyages on the inland waterways of Britain and Ireland. As well as remembering great moments of joy and wonder, the voyage is tinged with sadness given the recent deterioration in Pru's dementia(n)

programme.title: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Cameras go inside the Segregation Unit at HMP Winchester, a prison within a prison where some of the most difficult and disruptive offenders are sent. When segregation was first introduced to modern prisons in the mid-19th century, its aim was to force prisoners to reflect on their bad deeds. In recent years, the punishment has come under increasing scrutiny for the detrimental effect it can have on mental health, well-being and rehabilitation. The film explores why the units still exist and how prisons strive to deal with some of their most complex individuals(n)

programme.title: Dispatches

programme.title: Ancient Mysteries
programme.desc: Documentary examining the 2017 discovery of underwater ruins along the Tunisian coast that were once a vital Roman outpost, known as Neapolis. Evidence suggests that the metropolis was not completely destroyed, and that its inhabitants attempted to rebuild the city, but a geological phenomenon called liquefaction doomed these efforts. As the land under the city turned into quicksand, the harbour was gradually submerged. Now, more than a millennium since it disappeared, this new discovery is restoring Neapolis's reputation as a jewel in the crown of the Roman Empire(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Paul tries to buy Scarlett's silence, unaware that she has all the footage from the hidden cameras, while Aaron, David and Kyle install a security system at home(n)

programme.title: The Novel Murders: Garage Sale Mystery VI (2016)
programme.desc: An antiques expert is suspicious when she realises two clues found at the scene of a murder are remarkably similar to those from a popular fictional murder mystery novel. Whodunit, starring Lori Loughlin, Steve Bacic and Eva Bourne(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey wonders why he has started dreaming about dating Monica, while Phoebe finds a police badge at Central Perk and decides to take the law into her own hands(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel is interviewed for her dream job, but makes the mistake of inadvertently kissing her prospective employer. Meanwhile, Monica competes with Phoebe in the relationship stakes(n)

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Paul tries to buy Scarlett's silence, unaware that she has all the footage from the hidden cameras, while Aaron, David and Kyle install a security system at home(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Bella takes the witness stand and comes through the ordeal of cross-examination with flying colours, while Ben snaps out of his lethargy and starts to fight to clear his name(n)

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories(n)

programme.title: World's Tallest Skyscrapers: Beyond the Clouds
programme.desc: Engineer and film-maker Rob Bell presents an exploration of the global phenomenon that is the skyscraper, from the world's tallest building to those currently under construction. Rob examines the tallest of them all - the Burj Khalifa in Dubai, standing at almost 830m - where he discovers what it takes to build this high, and meets the woman responsible for the foundations of the Shard(n)

programme.title: Then & Now
programme.desc: In the 1860s, Charles Pearson had the idea to link up some of the capital's mainline stations with a new underground railway - the birth of the so-called Tube. As well as recalling its construction, this programme also recounts the tale of a bus that played a vital part in the First World War. The B-Type - a common sight on the streets of the capital before the war - worked as troop carriers on the front line in France. Also recalled is Hannah Dadds, who in 1978 became a trailblazer for women as she stepped into the cab of a District Line train to become the first ever female Tube driver on London Transport(n)

programme.title: Inside the Tower of London
programme.desc: Building works in the tower unearths some complete skeletons buried outside Henry VIII's chapel. Archaeologists examine the bones and attempt to uncover who these people were and how they came to be buried. Plus, the story of the tower during the Great Fire and a look at a handgun owned by Henry VIII, which provides an insight into the king's fascination with gunpowder weapons and its influence on the British war machine(n)

programme.title: The Sex Business
programme.desc: Return of the documentary looking at how and why people buy, sell and market sex. The first episodes delves into the hidden world of female submissives, following four sex workers who reveal what life is really like as they try to make a living on the edges of the sex industry(n)

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: Sarah Greene narrates a compilation of infamous moments from television history when programmes went disastrously wrong. Among the incidents featured are the death of Tommy Cooper in mid-performance, an invasion of the BBC news studios, and the wrong Miss Universe being crowned in front of 200 million viewers worldwide. Anthea Turner shares her memories of nearly being blown up when a pyrotechnic effect went wrong(n)

programme.title: Coneheads (1993)
programme.desc: An alien couple and their daughter crash-land on Earth and try to blend into suburban society, all the while dodging the immigration authorities and their increasingly suspicious neighbours. Comedy, starring Dan Aykroyd, Jane Curtin, Michael McKean, Jason Alexander, Michelle Burke, David Spade and Chris Farley(n)

programme.title: Carry On Cabby (1963)
programme.desc: The neglected wife of a workaholic taxi owner grows increasingly tired of his lack of interest in their marriage. In a ploy to bring him to his senses, she secretly launches a rival cab firm with a driver roster made up of attractive women, who soon tempt his customers away. Comedy, starring Sid James, Hattie Jacques, Kenneth Connor and Charles Hawtrey(n)

programme.title: The Day Shall Come Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Chris Morris and stars Marchant Davis and Kayvan Novak talk about making their new 'comedy with consequences'(n)

programme.title: Horton Hears a Who! (2008)
programme.desc: A kindly elephant hears a cry of help coming from a speck of dust and discovers the minuscule city of Whoville. As he tries to help its citizens, the other animals begin to question his sanity, and the evil Kangaroo incites them to turn against the do-gooder. Animated adaptation of Dr Seuss's book, with the voices of Jim Carrey, Steve Carell, Carol Burnett, Seth Rogen and Will Arnett(n)

programme.title: Night at the Museum: Battle of the Smithsonian (2009)
programme.desc: The living exhibits at New York's Museum of Natural History are shipped to Washington's Smithsonian Institution - along with the artefact that brought them to life in the first place. Nightwatchman Larry tries to retrieve it, only to find the contents of the world's largest museum have been reanimated, including a pharaoh determined to take over the world. Fantasy comedy sequel, starring Ben Stiller, Amy Adams, Owen Wilson and Steve Coogan(n)

programme.title: Last Vegas (2013)
programme.desc: A sixtysomething confirmed bachelor finally decides to settle down with his much younger girlfriend. He and three friends decide to mark the occasion by reliving their wild youth with a trip to Las Vegas - but they find that both the city and each other have changed since their glory days. Comedy, starring Michael Douglas, Robert De Niro, Morgan Freeman and Kevin Kline(n)

programme.title: T2 Trainspotting Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Danny Boyle and stars Ewan McGregor, Johnny Lee Miller, Ewen Bremner and Robert Carlyle talk about making the sequel to the 1996 classic(n)

programme.title: Sleepless (2017)
programme.desc: Las Vegas cop Vincent Downs steals a 25kg shipment of cocaine from a violent casino boss, whose associates kidnap Downs' teenage son in retaliation. Downs is keen to return the drugs and see his son set free, but is hampered by having to dodge the attentions of an internal affairs officer. Action thriller, starring Jamie Foxx, Dermot Mulroney and Michelle Monaghan(n)

programme.title: Slumdog Millionaire (2008)
programme.desc: An uneducated teenager from the Mumbai slums is only one question away from winning a quiz show, but the authorities are reluctant to believe a youngster from such a humble background could succeed without cheating. Under questioning, he tells a police inspector the eventful story of his life - and how he came to know so much. Danny Boyle's Oscar-winning drama, starring Dev Patel and Freida Pinto(n)

programme.title: 127 Hours (2010)
programme.desc: A mountain climber gets stuck in an isolated canyon when a boulder crushes his arm. Remaining trapped for five days, he comes to realise no one is going to save him, and that survival will depend on a particularly drastic course of action. Danny Boyle's fact-based drama, with James Franco and Kate Mara(n)

programme.title: Ride Lonesome (1959)
programme.desc: A bounty hunter captures young killer Billy John, but his real motive is not the cash reward - he has an old score to settle with his prisoner's brother Frank. As the journey to bring the murderer to justice gets under way, he is counting on a showdown with Frank and accepts the help of two outlaw gunmen for added protection, aware they will try to turn Billy John in themselves for the reward and a pardon. Western, with Randolph Scott, Lee Van Cleef, James Best, James Coburn and Pernell Roberts.(n)

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff! (1969)
programme.desc: A drifter in need of money takes the job of sheriff in a small mining outpost, and chooses the town drunk to be his deputy. Events take a chaotic turn when a family of influential crooks decides to pull out all the stops to do away with the lawman. Comedy Western, starring James Garner, Joan Hackett, Jack Elam, Bruce Dern and Walter Brennan(n)

programme.title: The Enemy Below (1957)
programme.desc: The captain of an American destroyer in the South Atlantic is still recovering from the sinking of his previous vessel. He tries to outwit a cunning German U-boat commander, but comes to respect the courage of his enemy. However, his crew fears he is not up to the challenge of defeating his opponent. Second World War thriller, starring Robert Mitchum, Curt Jurgens, Theodore Bikel and David Hedison(n)

programme.title: Warlock (1959)
programme.desc: A ruthless vigilante is recruited as a sheriff to clean up the streets of a crime-ridden town, but his strong-arm tactics soon antagonise the townsfolk. When a woman turns up and accuses the lawman of murdering her fiance, the residents rally to her cause with the help of a rival gunslinger. Western, starring Henry Fonda, Richard Widmark, Anthony Quinn, DeForest Kelley and Dorothy Malone(n)

programme.title: Super 8 (2011)
programme.desc: A boy and his friends sneak out at night to film an amateur zombie movie, only to witness a train derailment. As people start disappearing from their town and the military descends in force, they come to realise a dangerous alien was being transported on the train and is now on the loose. Sci-fi thriller, starring Joel Courtney and Elle Fanning(n)

programme.title: Terminator Genisys (2015)
programme.desc: A soldier fighting in a post-apocalyptic war against living machines is sent back in time to prevent an attempt to change the past - but when he arrives, he finds that history has been changed beyond recognition - and that a plot is being hatched by an unexpected enemy to destroy the future of the human race. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger and Emilia Clarke(n)

programme.title: Night Comes On (2019)
programme.desc: Angel Lamere is released from juvenile detention on the eve of her 18th birthday. Haunted by her past, she embarks on a journey with her 10-year-old sister that could destroy their future. Drama, starring Dominique Fishback, Tatum Marilyn Hall and Nastashia Fuller(n)

programme.title: Random Acts
programme.desc: The origins of grime, in 2003, reimagined as an otherworldly encounter. Directed by Dumas Haddad. Part of Film4's Black History Month programming(n)

programme.title: Second Coming (2014)
programme.desc: A happily married woman is shocked to discover she is pregnant as it has been months since she slept with her husband. Afraid of her spouse's reaction, she tries to keep the news to herself, but she cannot hide the truth indefinitely. Drama, starring Nadine Marshall, Idris Elba and Kai Francis Lewis(n)

programme.title: Rage at Dawn (1955)
programme.desc: Three notorious outlaw brothers terrorise Indiana, using a small town as a safe haven and paying off local officials to turn a blind eye. A detective poses as a fellow bandit to set a trap for them, but the case is complicated when he falls for their sister, who remains misguidedly loyal to her villainous family. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Forrest Tucker, Mala Powers and J Carrol Naish(n)

programme.title: The Violent Men (1955)
programme.desc: A ruthless cattle baron sets out to create his own private empire, no matter what the cost. When he resorts to murder, he makes an enemy of a civil war veteran, while his lust for power drives his wife into the arms of his younger brother. Western, starring Edward G Robinson, Barbara Stanwyck and Glenn Ford(n)

programme.title: Comanche (1956)
programme.desc: A powerful Native American chief agrees to take part in peace talks with Washington after an encounter with a sympathetic scout. However, a group of renegade warriors are unwilling to surrender their arms and their actions prompt a bigoted government official to use brutal methods. Western, starring Dana Andrews, Kent Smith, Nestor Paiva and Henry Brandon(n)

programme.title: Donovan's Reef (1963)
programme.desc: An American soldier settles down with a friend and a kindly doctor on a South Sea island to relax in the aftermath of the Second World War. The arrival of the medic's snobbish daughter throws their idyllic life into turmoil, leaving them struggling to make her father seem respectable. Comedy drama directed by John Ford, starring John Wayne, Lee Marvin, Jack Warden, Elizabeth Allen and Cesar Romero(n)

programme.title: 27 Dresses (2008)
programme.desc: Singleton Jane is literally always the bridesmaid and never the bride, a role she assumes for the 28th time when her sister announces she is getting married - to a man Jane is secretly in love with. As she wrestles with her feelings, Jane's predicament attracts the attention of a reporter fascinated by her story. Romantic comedy, starring Katherine Heigl, James Marsden and Malin Akerman(n)

programme.title: T2 Trainspotting Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Danny Boyle and stars Ewan McGregor, Johnny Lee Miller, Ewen Bremner and Robert Carlyle talk about making the sequel to the 1996 classic(n)

programme.title: Mechanic: Resurrection (2016)
programme.desc: Hitman Arthur Bishop's arch-enemy Crain kidnaps his new girlfriend Gina and blackmails him into committing three assassinations in as many days, while making them look like accidents. Action thriller sequel, starring Jason Statham, Jessica Alba, Sam Hazeldine and Tommy Lee Jones(n)

programme.title: Trainspotting (1996)
programme.desc: A heroin addict makes a series of attempts to kick the habit, but the grind of everyday life and a circle of similarly self-destructive friends keep dragging him back to his old ways. Following a near-fatal overdose, he comes to the realisation that the only way to put his life in order is to rid himself of his friends - which is easier said than done. Danny Boyle's drama based on Irvine Welsh's novel, starring Ewan McGregor, Robert Carlyle and Ewen Bremner(n)

programme.title: The Crystal Maze

programme.desc: The lazy moggy stows away in his owner's luggage and ends up in London. He is promptly mistaken for an English upper-class cat, who has recently inherited a grand estate, and moves into his stately home - much to the dismay of the real aristocratic feline's conniving relation, who is bent on swindling him out of his money. Family comedy, starring Breckin Meyer, Billy Connolly and Jennifer Love Hewitt, with the voices of Bill Murray and Tim Curry(n)

Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Jesse Eisenberg, Anne Hathaway and Jamie Foxx(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

However, it transpires that Howard, Raj and Stuart may have rushed the expectant mother to the hospital too early, with Raj having difficulty keeping the gender of the unborn child a secret(n)

programme.desc: Pilot episode of the comedy following the relationship between two people who meet at an Overeaters Anonymous meeting. Starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam has a birthday sleepover, during which his friend Garry shares out some of his father's home-brewed beer and makes everyone sick. Meanwhile, Barry and Erica want a new CD player, but Murray tells them he will only buy one for them if they write the greatest song ever(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly discovers Adam is failing in Spanish class, and immediately blames his teacher. However, when she arranges for him to receive extra tuition, her plan backfires(n)

Santiago tries to convince everyone that she can be laid back, Jeffords panics about losing his first-class flight, and Boyle pries into Diaz's personal life(n)

The squad suffers internet problems after the Cyber Crimes Unit move into the office downstairs(n)

programme.desc: When the friends find out about Bernadette's big news, they celebrate by getting together for an evening of karaoke. programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: The couple prepare to celebrate their first Christmas together, but Mike struggles to find the perfect gift for Molly. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy(n)

programme.desc: The couple go to the opera, but Mike fails to enjoy himself due to a cold. With her sweetheart bed-ridden, Molly decides to play nursemaid, but ends up coming into conflict with her patient's mother, who does not appear to appreciate having her role as carer usurped(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

Peralta and Boyle try to find ways to assist Diaz, Jeffords has an existential crisis, while Santiago and Gina attempt to repair the broken toilet in the ladies' room(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Speechless

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

Paddy and Zak's rivalry keeps the evening lively and loud, but the host reclaims the spotlight with a surprising revelation(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Events director and bodybuilding enthusiast Zak Roby hosts the third evening in Cheltenham and hopes his polite nature will help him scoop the £1,000 prize. However, a series of confusing party games alongside tricks and posturing at the dinner table mean Zak's quest is far from straightforward(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Australian admin assistant Kimberley Thomas hosts the fourth dinner party in Cheltenham and hopes that an evening of sophistication will win her the £1,000 prize. However, despite her best attempts to create a dignified atmosphere, it does not take long for Paddy Castledine to begin telling rude stories(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Paddy Castledine hosts the final dinner party in Cheltenham, and hopes that his simple menu of locally sourced produce will impress his guests. As the evening draws on, admin assistant Kimberley Thomas tells the host what she really thinks of him, and alpha male Oli Delaunoy is brought to tears, before the winner of the £1,000 cash prize is revealed(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

Susan and David Speak are frustrated by the low shower pressure, while Jade Hendon butts heads with Matthew over healthy eating at dinner and the hosts' absence at breakfast the next morning gets the criticism flowing(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to The Partridge in Oxfordshire, where young couple Matthew Cockman and Paula Szkwarkowska hope guests will get on board with their passion for local organic food. A communal bathroom has the guests lost for words, and the lack of a hot breakfast included in the price leaves a bad taste in everyone's mouths(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to Strawberry Gardens B&B in Heysham for the third day of the contest, where husband and wife team Susan and David Speak offer home-from-home accommodation and an abundance of northern hospitality. Sports enthusiast David treats his guests to a traditional darts competition, adjudicated by former world champion Alan Warriner-Little, but he is unimpressed when Paula sends back her evening meal. However, it is Chris and Jacqui's feedback that disappoints the hosts the most(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Bateman's Mill near Chesterfield, where manager Jade Hendon has high hopes of being the best. But she faces an uphill battle when David and Susan go out of their way to find hairs in the bathroom - and to make mattters worse, her Derbyshire breakfast is not a hit with Chris and Jacqui(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and to settle some scores, starting with Chris and Jacqui, owners of the Bell House, who want to find out why Matthew marked them down for being 'too tall' for his bed. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: PC Matt Ambrose is called to the home of an elderly woman in Crewe who is devastated to have had nearly £10,000 of her life savings stolen from her bank account. In Warrington, PCs Ross Dryden and Lyndsey Whitehurst are on the lookout for a repeat offender suspected of theft and assault, and PC Sarah Brockley is called to a smallholding in Cheshire to investigate whether foul play is involved in the disappearance of 13 ducks, although the owner is more bothered by the sentimental value of the birds(n)

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Medics fly to the aid of mountain biker Rob in the Cumbrian mountains. Off-road motorbiker Dean is set to miss his friend's 50th birthday celebrations after taking a nasty tumble. Plus, 15-year-old Robbie needs urgent care when he falls from a coastal cliff in South Shields(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Frontline

programme.desc: Celebrities including actress Amanda Barrie and cricket commentator Henry Blofeld take a wry look at the ageing process, and have an amusing encounter with a cosmetic surgeon(n)

programme.desc: Kate Quilton visits Vietnam, where a global surge in demand for pepper has transformed the lives of farmers across the country. Jimmy Doherty meets a man whose job entails harvesting different strains of yeast from locations around the world and Matt Tebbutt looks into how manufacturers flavour crisps(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin shows Jill and Philip Hefford a selection of properties that fall within their £125,000 budget in Clearwater, Florida, where the couple want to buy a decent-sized home for Philip's daughter that can double-up as a winter-time holiday home for themselves(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Ian Tan and his partner Christine Walsh hope to buy a pad near Sarasota in Florida. With a flexible budget of £150,000 to £250,000, the pair peruse a selection of options along the Gulf Coast. Presented by Jonnie Irwin(n)

programme.title: Love It or List It Australia
programme.desc: Natalie is over the dated kitchen and odd layout of the Coburg North home she has owned for 10 years and wants to swap it for an abode in the sunnier weather of Queensland, but Matt disagrees. Andrew Winter suggests a Brisbane alternative, while Neale Whitaker believes improvements could be made to the Melbourne property(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: New chateau owners Jayne and Steve need to get four en suite themed bedrooms ready for their new B&B business. For the Oriental suite, Jayne goes to visit Angel for help and advice. Plus, a chance to meet Brit Justin and his Aussie wife Annabelle, who are turning their chateau, with its sweeping views of the Pyrenees, into a family home(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former property developer Ian hosts the first dinner party in Gloucestershire, hoping his super-healthy menu will win him the £1,000 prize - although it is possible his guests may be more impressed with his 12-bedroom mansion in the country. Some naked antics, a pinata and stories of millions pounds won and lost make it a night to remember(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Then-Miss Cheltenham Sophie hosts the second dinner party in Gloucestershire, hoping her evening of elegant food and pageantry will win her the £1,000 prize. The 24-year-old reveals what she does for a living to her guests, and one attendee makes a surprising confession of her own(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Rugby-loving Carmel hosts the third dinner party in Gloucestershire, and she hopes to impress with a 'Six Nations' starter, a pancetta, king prawn and chorizo main, and a Key lime pie for dessert. An attempt to charm her guests backfires when she likens Ian to a psychotic killer, and the atmosphere takes a further knock after Chris gets on the wrong side of Sophie(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: School teacher Polly, 40, hosts the fourth night of the competition in Gloucestershire, and hopes to impress her guests with a fine-dining experience. She begins with a seafood starter before serving up a meaty main course, and isn't unnerved by the fact she hasn't had any practise cooking either dish. However, her guests show off round the table and threaten to take the attention away from the night, but Ian is highly impressed with Polly's choice of entertainment(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the turn of exuberant hair salon owner Chris to host the final dinner party in Gloucestershire with home-made treats on the menu, including a tiger prawn starter, venison for the main and a dessert of chocolate and walnut ice-cream. Chat around the table reveals some differing opinions after the guests make a discovery in the host's living room, and the group reflect on their time together before the winner of the cash prize is announced(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are on the Wirral, where Simon has a plan to turn a chunky chain into a standard lamp and Henry picks up a 1963 Ford Anglia to get it back to its best(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary capturing the behaviour of the animals at Chester Zoo. Kendari the babirusa - a bizarre-looking creature also known as a deer-pig - is trying to give birth, but is being disturbed by a couple of mischievous otters. Young male orang-utan Willie struggles to impress the females, while Raz the aye-aye, a rare nocturnal primate related to lemurs, is being encouraged to share his home with two jumping rats(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick and his team fight to save the leg of a much-loved golden retriever, and a French bulldog with twisted elbows needs a doggy wheelchair and some challenging surgery. At Noel's Oncology & Soft Tissue Hospital in Guildford, a spaniel cross has a tumour removed by specialist Professor Nick Bacon(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs Revisited
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits Francis and Karen Shaw to asses whether their efforts to save a peel tower in the heart of the Yorkshire Dales paid off. While the project was a chance to fulfil a childhood dream, the building's ancient status meant it was protected by numerous regulations. When the couple finally managed to get through the red tape, new and unexpected setbacks jeopardised the project and sent the budget spiralling out of control(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick gets to work on the walled garden in the spring and buys a mini tractor for the job - but it may not fit through the gate. Angel designs another suite, with black walls and mosaic mirrors, and decorates the entire dining room with blossoms so a guest can make a special wedding proposal. The couple also consider the possibility of truffle farming(n)

programme.title: Secrets of the Superfactories

programme.title: The World's Most Extreme
programme.desc: From Siberia to India, the Andes to the Arctic, this programme looks at the world's 10 most extreme roads. Dashboard-mounted cameras capture mayhem in Russia, while in the US, helicopters bomb snowy mountainsides to launch huge avalanches that will help to keep the roads open and safe. In the Australian Outback - where kangaroos can pose more risk than other motorists - truck drivers face all kinds of dangers to deliver their cargo(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The emergency room documentary continues, highlighting the stories of people facing adversity head-on. Erin, a 61-year-old former cancer patient with an ear infection, is rushed to St George's Hospital after she collapsed at home. Doctors fear the condition may have spread to her brain, and send her for a CT scan to find out more. Tony, a 70-year-old part-time DJ, arrives in A&E after being involved in a high-speed bicycle accident while training for a 100-mile charity bike ride, and Charlie, a 39-year-old cabin crew worker, turns up at the hospital complaining of unbearable pain after discharging himself during a previous visit, and removing the cast fitted to support his broken arm(n)

programme.desc: Louise hosts the second night in Milton Keynes, where she hopes to wow her guests with her 'fabulous' menu - including bruschetta and mousse. However, the outspoken PA receives criticism from her guests - will she be able to overcome it to secure the prize?(n)

programme.desc: Management consultant David hosts the third dinner party in Milton Keynes, and his guests are impressed when he introduces some dancing Las Vegas showgirls. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Customer services manager and vegetarian Helen hosts the fourth night of the competition in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, and hopes that an East meets West-themed night will win her the £1,000 prize. Hypnotherapist Howard is intrigued by some items he finds in her bedroom, while salesman Simon enjoys her entertainment(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the final evening in Milton Keynes and the dinner party is thrown by salesman Simon, who believes that his night of fine dining will impress the critical guests. However, things begin to go awry when Howard embarks on a mission to throw his plans off course, and Helen discovers a collection of awards that evidence the host's competitive nature. Meanwhile, Louise finally comes clean about her dislike of David, before the votes are cast and the winner is announced(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team is near Preston, where Simon O'Brien restores a spotlight he believes may be from a German U-boat while Henry Cole gets creative with an aircraft jump seat(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary capturing the behaviour of the animals at Chester Zoo. An outbreak of disease in the penguin colony leaves chick Munch fighting for his life. Sulawesi macaque Lisa gives birth and dad Mamassa is providing pretty useless, so older brother Beaker steps in to help with the babysitting. Andean spectacled bear Bernie is determined to woo Lima when she enters her short window of fertility, and young male tortoise Football muscles in on 71-year-old Bert's harem of females(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick and his team face an emergency when a black Labrador is rushed in after being hit by a car. The pioneering vets also treat a cocker spaniel with a bulging disc in its spine and a basset hound that needs its leg straightening. However, the dog is also overweight, so the professor insists it be put on a diet(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs

Determined to rebuild the property, they have taken the opportunity to convert it into a stunning modern home, but with project manager Alex's lack of experience and the debt piling up, they face disaster for a second time(n)

They explain how early Britons learned to control the land they lived on, and explore how the evolution of house-building helped change the way people lived(n)

programme.title: Time Team Specials
programme.desc: Tony Robinson and John Gater chart the rise and development of geophysics technology since the archaeology programme's first dig in 1994. programme.title: Wonders of the Monsoon
programme.desc: Colin Salmon narrates a documentary exploring how the lives of humans and animals across a vast area of the planet are affected by the transforming power of the monsoon rains. The end of the dry season in northern Australia sees 300,000 flying foxes gathering to drink while running a gauntlet of freshwater crocodiles, while in Sumatra a female orang-utan guides her youngster to where she knows a fig tree fruits at this time of year. At the Delhi stock exchange, the price of rice escalates every day the rains fail to materialise and priests submerge themselves in water and beseech Varuna, god of water, to come(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarella's in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leone's in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, where he meets a stubborn owner who doesn't react well to criticism. Tom bought the restaurant for his daughter Andrea, but six years later he's still refusing to let her run it. Can the chef break Tom's iron grip on the business and persuade him to change his outdated approach?(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Beaver, Pennsylvania, where he meets a brother-and-sister team who find it almost impossible to work together. programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo

Meanwhile, Keeper Isolde comes up with an unusual plan to give the zoo's three Komodo dragon sisters some much needed space from each other, and Chester's male lemurs are in for a shock with a female on her way to share their island(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with two couples who were searching for their first homes. In 2018 in Kettering, Claudia and Tom wanted room for their work as illustrators and for their crafting hobbies, as well as the room to start a family. Meanwhile in Leicester, Mike and Karen needed help finding a home to bring them together(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Charity manager Andrew Batsford hosts the first of a week of parties from Hastings, aiming to inspire his fellow contestants with a menu of dishes prepared using foraged ingredients, including sea broccoli and stinging nettles. However, if the food fails to win them over, he hopes a dynamic Wham!-themed evening of festivities will do the trick(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the second day of the competition in Hastings, East Sussex, and retired solicitor Adrian Carter is hoping to impress his guests with a Moroccan-themed evening. However, disaster strikes when he neglects his tagine, and his rendition of a Rod Stewart classic does not go down well either(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Sally-Anne Keller hosts a German-themed dinner party on the third night in Hastings, East Sussex, and requires her guests to dress, sing and dance accordingly. Charity manager Andrew Batsford explains how the principles of anarchism and punk can be applied to football, while retired solicitor Adrian Carter dresses as the 19th-century statesman Otto von Bismarck and raises eyebrows with his jokes(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Kate Eadon hosts the fourth dinner party in Hastings, East Sussex, with a menu styled on a gourmet pub meal. Adrian Carter gets himself in hot water, Sally-Anne Keller reveals a surprise celebrity crush, and the host recounts her own encounter with a famous funnyman(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The confident Stelios Michael hosts the final night in Hastings, East Sussex, hoping to impress his guests with a Greek-inspired evening. The diners get involved when they receive a masterclass in the country's traditional dance, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the Unicorn Inn in Ludlow, Shropshire, where husband and wife team Lee and Zoe Osbourne hope their glamorous fairy-tale style rooms will impress(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A Kent couple living in France make sacrifices to keep their dreams alive, while a woman struggles with being a single mother and running a new hotel in Andalusia(n)

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Doug Guller, the CEO and founder of Bikinis Sports Bar and Grill, a restaurant chain known for its scantily-clad waitresses, poses as a reality show contestant and works undercover alongside his staff. With big growth for the business on the horizon, he wants to make sure everything in the organisation is running smoothly(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to change the fortunes of the Olde Stone Mill restaurant in Tuckahoe, New York, which is struggling to attract customers, leading to debts of nearly $1million. Gordon feels the owner is more interested in his own appearance than how his food tastes and a screaming match ensues(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy puts Robert in charge of writing invitations to their forthcoming wedding, but he tries to evade responsibility by seeking advice from Ray and Frank. They tell him his best bet is to make an appalling mess of the job so she will have to do it all herself. With Brad Garrett and Ray Romano(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra is too ill to take Ally to a pyjama party, so Ray reluctantly agrees to do the honours. Unfortunately it means coming face to face with Peggy, an old enemy who physically assaulted him during a charity event(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Attractive and popular psychologist Dr Honey Snow dates Frasier, who is so flattered that he agrees to write the introduction to her latest book - a decision that later causes him a king-size crisis of conscience. Guest starring Shannon Tweed(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Cheers owner Sam Malone turns up in Seattle to ask for advice on whether to go through with his wedding - but Frasier recognises his old friend's fiancee as a woman he slept with three months previously. Comedy, guest starring Ted Danson and Tea Leoni(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts Thomas and Doreen from Sunderland have been dreaming of owning a holiday home in Spain since their first anniversary there 39 years ago. Scarlette Douglas searches far and wide to find them the perfect property for their £55,000 budget. But will it be a modern apartment near the sea or a traditional cave house in the countryside that wins their hearts?(n)

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Wendy searches for a villa for a couple want to swap Kent winters for the Spanish sunshine, and Chris and Carol looking to swap their motor home for a permanent retirement retreat(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef again comes to the aid of failing American restaurants, starting in Fishtown, Philadelphia, where he tries to help the three owners of the Hot Potato Cafe, which has not made a profit in two years. Spurred on by a scathing review by an influential critic, he makes radical changes to alter the staff's attitudes and create food that is up to his own exacting standards(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits a home built on an airfield in Strathaven in Scotland to check on the progress made by Colin MacKinnon and his partner Marta Briongos. Their ambitious plan was to build a metal-sculptural home inspired by aircraft hangars right next to the runway, but the difficulties of building their elegant design saw a year-long project stretch to three years(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on programmes including The X Factor: Celebrity, The Lesbian Guide to Straight Sex, Own the Sky: Jetpack Dreamers, Celebrity Hunted, Pain, Pus and Poison: The Search for Modern Medicines and the news(n)

programme.title: Tom Allen Absolutely Live
programme.desc: The comedian's unique style of sharp, acerbic wit and camp, riotous storytelling has seen him sell out shows all over the country, culminating in this recording of the show at his spiritual home - the world-famous London Palladium(n)

programme.title: Great British Car Journeys
programme.desc: Christopher Timothy and Peter Davison travel from the southern tip of the New Forest and along the Jurassic Coast, concluding at Burgh Island and visiting popular holiday destinations of the 1930s along the way. They also get behind the wheel of some classic cars, including Agatha Christie's favourite automobile and a car made famous by Doctor Who(n)

programme.title: Great Rail Restorations with Peter Snow
programme.desc: Peter Snow and Henry Cole visit projects across the country where teams of restoration experts are attempting to restore historic railway carriages to their former glory. The first stop is the stunning Vale of Llangollen in North Wales, to visit a 1912 carriage designed by Sir Nigel Gresley, the creator of the Flying Scotsman, where Henry explores how the emergency cord was invented and learns how rail travellers coped before toilets were introduced on trains(n)

programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice Roberts explores Cardiff's Edwardian past, discovering how the coal industry transformed the Rhondda Valley in the early 1900s. She investigates the difficult and often dangerous work of the miners, and visits the trading floor where the first ever million pound cheque was signed. The programme also investigates how global shipping routes and plentiful employment brought immigrants from across the world to Wales, and meets descendants of people who came to the city in the early years of the 20th century(n)

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales embark on another waterway adventure, starting in the romantic city of Oxford, where they began their courtship many years ago. They follow the gentle contours of the Oxford Canal through the Cherwell Valley, where they meet novelist Philip Pullman and are joined by their son, fellow actor Samuel West. Tim and Pru follow in the footsteps of author Tom Rolt, whose vivid account of his journey down this canal in 1939 ignited a campaign that went on to save Britain's canals from extinction(n)

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses

programme.title: Your Room or Mine?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: NHS manager Helen Mather holds the first party in Leicester, hoping her plans for a simple menu will allow her more time to entertain her guests. In east London, an Indian restaurant owner begins to take his financial responsibilities seriously when Del and Dael start removing cookers and freezers from his premises, and a pair of pensioners in Oxfordshire hope the High Court will provide them a lifeline as they try to pay off a £4,000 bill to a solicitors' firm after a failed compensation claim(n)

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong(n)

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: The story behind Ben Affleck's Academy Award-winning film Argo as told by retired CIA officer Antonio Mendez who freed American diplomats from Iran by pretending to be a film producer. Including interviews with two of the embassy staff whose lives he saved, Cora Amburn-Lijek and Mark Lijek(n)

programme.desc: Follow the work of the New Zealand Customs agents in their quest to prevent illegal items passing through the country's borders.(n)

programme.title: King Alfred and the Anglo-Saxons
programme.desc: Michael Wood explores the role played by Alfred the Great's daughter Aethelflaed in England's battles in civil war and against the Vikings. The presenter contemplates how England 'may never have happened' without the young ruler of Mercia, who led armies, built fortresses, was a skilled diplomat in campaigning against the Norse invaders, and became a beloved leader in the British Isles(n)

programme.title: Royal Wives at War
programme.desc: A revealing look at the abdication crisis of 1936, through the eyes of the two women at its very heart. In a number of dramatised monologues set in 1967, Elizabeth the Queen Mother (Emma Davies) and Wallis Simpson (Gina McKee) look back at the dramatic events that led to King Edward VIII giving up the throne for the woman he loved. With Nick Waring, John Sackville and Emma Campbell-Jones, and featuring contributors including Lady Colin Campbell, Andrew Morton and John Julius Norwich(n)

programme.title: Storyville
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the private life of former Libyan dictator Colonel Muammar Muhammad Abu Minyar al-Gaddafi, revealing his disturbing abuses of power. Filmed across the Pacific, Cuba, Brazil, the US, South Africa and Australia, the programme also considers how Libya's vast oil reserves were a key reason why the 'mad dog', as President Reagan dubbed him, managed to maintain such a strong alliance with the West prior to the Arab Spring that cemented his demise at home and led to his overthrow and death in 2011(n)

programme.title: We Still Steal the Old Way (2017)
programme.desc: After their exploits in We Still Kill the Old Way, criminal outfit the Archer Gang encounters an old enemy when a daring heist ends with them behind bars, however that doesn't stop them attempting to break out an old friend. Prison drama, starring Ian Ogilvy, Billy Murray, Julian Glover and Lysette Anthony(n)

programme.title: Can You Keep it Up for a Week? (1974)
programme.desc: A workshy man's fiancee challenges him to hold down a steady job - a situation that puts him squarely in the path of temptation. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan, Jeremy Bulloch, Neil Hallett and Jill Damas(n)

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Michael Mosley and the team explore the health benefits of omega-3 fish oils, and Dr Chris van Tulleken puts these omega-3 supplements to the test. Elsewhere, Dr Zoe Williams goes on a high fat diet to discover why eating a lot of fat affects men and women differently, and Gabriel Weston seeks out an innovative new brain treatment for PTSD(n)

programme.title: Traders: Millions by the Minute
programme.desc: The concluding programme meets a new breed of trader - the British men and women who play the financial markets online from their kitchens, sofas and bedrooms. Mother-of-three Jane squeezes currency trading in-between the school run and her work as a nurse, and is hoping to raise capital by selling her 10 Bengal kittens. Justyn and Akil are both convinced that trading will be their ticket to a lavish lifestyle, while Rene gave up a successful career as an antiques dealer for a new existence as a trader, and is undeterred despite seven years of struggling to break even. Saskia Reeves narrates(n)

programme.title: Queensbury Boxing League
programme.desc: Boxers battle it out over three, four and five two minute rounds against opponents - the most successful competitors will earn the right to challenge for the coveted Queensbury British title.(n)

programme.title: Run
programme.desc: A Chinese woman who sells pirated films and stolen phones on the streets of Brixton, south London, has to repay her debts to a local gang, but when an immigration raid leaves her with no home, money or friends, she finds refuge with a barber - and an unlikely bond soon forms. The second of four dramas telling the stories of seemingly unconnected people facing life-changing decisions, starring Katie Leung, Gershwyn Eustache Jr, Benedict Wong and Lennie James(n)

programme.title: My Name Is Lenny (2017)
programme.desc: Biopic of bare-knuckle fighter Lenny McLean, exploring his troubled upbringing and early days in the unlicensed boxing world, and his career-long rivalry with fellow fighter Roy Shaw. Starring Josh Helman, Michael Bisping and John Hurt in one of his final roles(n)

programme.title: Keeping Britain Safe 24/7
programme.desc: Julia Bradbury and Matt Allwright profile the everyday heroes who battle the challenges that arise with each passing season. In autumn they ride along with the crews of Cleveland Fire Brigade on Bonfire Night - their busiest time of the year - and meet the railway workers that keep the country moving in the face of those dreaded leaves on the line. Also, as the national birth rate rockets, cameras follow the midwives of St Thomas' Hospital, central London, as they face an autumnal baby boom(n)

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Michael Mosley and the team explore the health benefits of omega-3 fish oils, and Dr Chris van Tulleken puts these omega-3 supplements to the test. Elsewhere, Dr Zoe Williams goes on a high fat diet to discover why eating a lot of fat affects men and women differently, and Gabriel Weston seeks out an innovative new brain treatment for PTSD(n)

programme.title: Hell is Sold Out (1951)
programme.desc: An author long assumed dead makes a surprise return, only to find books he did not write are being published under his name. He discovers that another writer, claiming to be his widow, is passing off her own creations as his previously unseen work to get them published. Drama, starring Mai Zetterling, Herbert Lom and Richard Attenborough(n)

programme.title: Cone of Silence (1961)
programme.desc: A flying instructor investigates a series of mysterious aircraft accidents blamed on one pilot and finds evidence which may clear the unfortunate suspect's name. Drama, starring Peter Cushing, Michael Craig, Elizabeth Seal and George Sanders(n)

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: The comedian takes over the science programme in a special episode for BBC's sitcom season, turning it into a chat show with eminent scientists as guests. He talks to them about the nature of laughter, with the studio audiences serving as guinea pigs in his attempt to get to the bottom of what laughter is, what it has to do with comedy, and why human beings find it a pleasurable sensation. The programme reveals that laughter predates the human species and may have played a vital role in our evolution(n)

programme.title: The Repo Man
programme.desc: In recession-hit Britain, many people have turned to finance companies to purchase items over a fixed period of time. This documentary follows the life and work of bailiff Sean James as he confronts debtors across the nation who fail to keep up their repayments(n)

programme.title: Essex Heist (2017)
programme.desc: A mechanic struggling to make ends meet hears that a large sum of money is being transported through the area, so he and his friends plot to steal it. However, their lives end up on the line when they discover they have just unwittingly robbed a ruthless gangster. Crime thriller, starring Glenn Salvage and Georgia Annable(n)

programme.title: Mob Handed (2016)
programme.desc: A journalist is outraged to receive no help from the police when her daughter is murdered, and resolves to take the law into her own hands. Her mission of vengeance leads her to join a gang of football hooligans pledged to bring vigilante justice to anyone who harms children. Thriller, starring Yvette Rowland and Robin Reid(n)

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman invite more famous faces to take part in the general knowledge quiz. This time, stars from the world of soaps - both past and present - are challenged to come up with the answers no-one else could think of. Former EastEnders Joe Swash (Micky Miller) and John Altman (Nick Cotton) join forces, veteran Hollyoaks actor Nick Pickard (Tony Hutchinson) teams up with old co-star Ali Bastian (Becca Dean), Waterloo Road secretary Victoria Bush (Sonya Donnegan) partners former student Zaraah Abrahams (Michaela White) and Holby City nurse Tina Hobley (Chrissie Williams) reunites with her on-screen mother Sharon Maughan (Tricia Williams)(n)
